parsed.rationale: Waypoint C is located inside a closed contour labeled 7400, indicating it is at the peak of a hill. Waypoint A is located on a contour line labeled 7200, which is a lower elevation. A straight line drawn between them must cross the 7400 contour to exit the peak, meaning the elevation initially increases. After crossing the 7400 contour, the line descends to reach the 7200 contour at waypoint A, causing the elevation to decrease.
